notes: Independent sound controls: ducking on/off, whole-video or fade-in-after-hook playback, per-sound volume. Per-section recording on by default for new clips, faster dashboard, cleaner settings.
_urls: windows.url is the GitHub Release asset (stable, public, direct .exe) and sha256 pins the exact binary - the 2.9.8+ updater verifies the download against it before offering to install. mac stays EMPTY on purpose: the Mac build ships as a .zip, which the in-app updater does not run; Mac customers always get the newest build from app.lemonsqueezy.com/my-orders.
